FiNNPy API¶

This section documents the functions offered by FiNNPy.

  • Basic
    • Common Average Re-Referencing
    • Downsampling
  • Cross frequency connectivity (cfc)
    • Direct Modulation Index
    • Modulation Index
    • Mean Vector Length
    • Phase Lock Value
  • Cleansing
    • Bad channel identification
    • Channel restoration
    • Outlier removal
  • File IO
    • Data manager
    • Load brainvision data
  • Filters
    • Butterwort filter
    • FIR filter
  • Misc
    • Timed Pool
  • Same frequency coupling (sfc)
    • Directional absolute coherence
    • Phase slope index
    • Weighted phase lag index
    • Imaginary coherence
    • Magnitude squared coherence
    • Complex coherency
  • Source reconstruction
  • Statistical
    • Generalized linear mixed model
  • Visualization
    • Topoplot
